name: UBA : Internet Settings Modified
notes: Detects modifications of internet settings on the system.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5000844) Success Audit: A registry value was modified
when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event matches RegistryObject (custom) contains any of \Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings
when the event matches RegistryObject (custom) does not contain any of \Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings\Wpad
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Internet Settings Modified on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000844) Success Audit: A registry value was modified
AND when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event matches RegistryObject (custom) contains any of \Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings
AND when the event matches RegistryObject (custom) does not contain any of \Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings\Wpad
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Internet Settings Modified
